privacy_red_lines.name: paper_content_documents_must_not_be_open_sourced
privacy_red_lines.rule: Do not commit, push, or otherwise open-source paper manuscripts, drafts, notes, visual organization documents, PDFs, DOC/DOCX files, TeX sources, or any document containing unpublished paper content.
privacy_red_lines.required_action: Keep paper-content documents local/private and remove them from GitHub if they are accidentally tracked.
